name: fit_size
description: fit, sizing accuracy, runs small or large, dimensions

name: comfort
description: comfort, feel when worn, support, softness, irritation

name: fabric_material
description: fabric, material quality, thickness, stretch, breathability

description: whether color, pattern, and appearance match photos or expectations

name: wash_wear
description: washing, shrinking, fading, pilling, wear after laundering

name: appearance_style
description: visual appearance, style, how it looks when worn, aesthetic appeal.

name: value_price
description: perceived value for money, pricing fairness, worth the cost.
